assertions.assertion: Mentions audience mismatch as a common cause — Audience in JwtBearerOptions must match the ApiResource name in IdentityServer
assertions.rationale: Audience mismatch is mentioned, though not specifically linked to ApiResource name.

assertions.assertion: Mentions the importance of ValidTypes = ['at+jwt'] and warns about JWT confusion attacks without it
assertions.rationale: ValidTypes and JWT confusion attacks are not mentioned at all.

assertions.assertion: Mentions scope claim format inconsistency — space-delimited vs array — as a cause of silent authorization failures
assertions.rationale: Scope claim format issues are not mentioned.

assertions.assertion: Mentions checking the middleware pipeline ordering (UseAuthentication before UseAuthorization)
assertions.rationale: Middleware ordering is mentioned with code example.
